name: 還得是親爹 - 雅方國際談判篇
description: 描述女兒以社群粉絲價值向總裁父親討要宣傳費，卻被父親以研發債務反將一軍的幽默反轉短片。

narrative.structure: 女兒開價(起) -> 雙方金額拉鋸加碼(承) -> 父親揭露債務絕殺(轉) -> 女兒認輸買奶茶(合)
narrative.summary: 女兒試圖利用帳號影響力跟父親談判百萬分潤，沒想到老謀深算的父親逐一加碼場地與研發成本，最終讓女兒從談判者變成買奶茶的打雜小妹。

hook.description: 女兒開口要求100萬報酬的利益衝突直接切入主題。

structure.action: {character} and father sitting at a table in {scene} starting a debate

structure.purpose: Introduce the opposing force in the negotiation

structure.action: Rapid dialogue cuts between {character} and father regarding {product} costs

structure.purpose: Highlight the emotional payoff of the twist

structure.action: {character} notices the camera and tries to stop the {style} recording
structure.purpose: Final punchline and breaking the fourth wall

visualFlow.rhythmPattern: Dialogue-driven ping-pong cuts with text overlays

promptTemplate.base: Cinematic indoor lighting, corporate office aesthetic, 9:16 aspect ratio, high definition.
perShot: A wide shot of {character} and father at {scene} in {style}.
Close-up of father with {emotion} face discussing {product} in {scene}.
Fast-paced montage of {character} and father in {scene} during a debate.
Extreme close-up of {character} with {emotion} expression, {style} vibes.
Handheld {style} shot of {character} reaching toward the lens in {scene}.

useCase: Corporate branding through family-style comedy skits

source.title: 還得是親爹__雅方國際__茱莉亞林

analysis.whyItWorks: Uses the power dynamic between a CEO father and an influencer daughter to create relatable humor while naturally integrating company identity.
analysis.targetAudience: Young adults and office workers who enjoy family-centric comedy.
replicableElements: Breaking the fourth wall at the end
